assertions.assertion: Identifies the missing X-CSRF: 1 header as the root cause
assertions.rationale: Explicitly identifies X-CSRF: 1 header as missing

assertions.assertion: Provides a fetch wrapper or interceptor that adds the X-CSRF: 1 header automatically
assertions.rationale: Provides bffFetch wrapper that adds X-CSRF: 1 header

assertions.assertion: Shows 401 response handling that redirects to /bff/login
Mentions that /bff/login and /bff/logout must be browser navigations (window.location.href), not fetch calls
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states they must be browser navigations with window.location.href, not fetch()
